title: Incorrect result when ON clause refers to table to the right
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE PRECISION, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT * FROM users LEFT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id WHERE orders.amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN ON clause refers to right table column
